name: Airorca
desc: Once per turn: You can banish 1 Fish, Sea Serpent, or Aqua monster from your hand, then target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy that target, then banish this card until your next Standby Phase.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can banish 1 Fish, Sea Serpent, or Aqua monster from your hand, then target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy that target, then banish this card until your next Standby Phase.
eff: Once per turn: You can banish 1 Fish, Sea Serpent, or Aqua monster from your hand, then target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy that target, then banish this card until your next Standby Phase.

sets.set: Speed Duel: Streets of Battle City

action: Returns itself to field while banished
mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Trap Cards
